Class DatabaseMethods

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operationsDB_interface.DatabaseMethods
All Implemented Interfaces:
DatabaseInterface
public class DatabaseMethods extends Object implements DatabaseInterface
Class which contains the implementations of DatabaseInterface Provides the functionality for other teams to have indirect access to the Operations team database
Version:
2.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya

  • Method Details

    • getBookings

      public List<Booking> getBookings(Connection conn, LocalDate timeframeStart, LocalDate timeframeEnd) throws Exception
      Returns a list of Booking objects. Bookings contain multiple events accessible via .getEvents() Events contain a SeatingConfig accessible via .getSeatingConfig The restricted views within the SeatingConfig via
      Specified by:
      getBookings in interface DatabaseInterface
      Parameters:
      conn - Connection variable for the database
      timeframeStart - LocalDate determining the start of the time frame from which to fetch bookings
      timeframeEnd - LocalDate determining the end of the time frame from which to fetch bookings
      Returns:
      List containing bookings
      Throws:
      Exception

    • addFilmBooking

      public boolean addFilmBooking(Connection conn, String eventName, LocalDateTime startDateTime, LocalDateTime endDateTime, BigDecimal ticketPrice, double maxDiscount, String venueName) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: DatabaseInterface
      Adds a film booking hosted by Lancaster's Music Hall to the calendar and database
      Specified by:
      addFilmBooking in interface DatabaseInterface
      Parameters:
      conn - Connection variable for the database
      eventName - Name of the event
      startDateTime - LocalDateTime determining when the event is
      endDateTime - LocalDateTime determining when the event ends
      ticketPrice - Price of the tickets as a BigDecimal
      maxDiscount - Maximum discount that can be applied to ticket prices
      venueName - Name of the venue, must be "Main Hall" or "Small Hall"
      Returns:
      true if booking was successful
      Throws:
      Exception

    • isVenueAvailable

      public boolean isVenueAvailable(Connection conn, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, String venueName) throws Exception
      Returns true if a venue can be used between the given time frame
      Specified by:
      isVenueAvailable in interface DatabaseInterface
      Parameters:
      conn - Connection variable for the database
      start - LocalDateTime determining the start of the timeframe to search between
      end - LocalDateTime determining the end of the timeframe to search between
      venueName - Name of the venue
      Returns:
      true if the venue is available
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getEventsForBooking

      private List<IEvent> getEventsForBooking(Connection conn, int bookingID, String companyName) throws SQLException
      Gets events for a given bookingID
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      bookingID - unique identifier for a booking
      companyName - company who hosts the booking
      Returns:
      list of events for the booking
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getRestrictedViewsForSeatingConfig

      private List<String> getRestrictedViewsForSeatingConfig(Connection conn, int seatingConfigID) throws SQLException
      Gets list of restricted views for a given seating configuration
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      seatingConfigID - unique identifier for the seating configuration
      Returns:
      list of restricted seats
      Throws:
      SQLException
